description_long: This sculpture depicts a group of five human figures standing closely together on a rectangular base. The figures include both men and women, each dressed in period clothing, with some appearing to have their hands bound behind their backs, suggesting a somber or historical theme. The central figure stands barefoot and holds a chain, while the others display varied postures and expressions, contributing to a sense of collective experience or shared fate. The surface of the sculpture is textured and weathered, with a patina typical of cast bronze or similar metal. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with detailed facial features, clothing folds, and body language. The base is solid and slightly raised, providing stability and prominence to the group.
description: A realistic, weathered metal sculpture of five human figures standing together on a rectangular base, some with hands bound and one holding a chain. The group exudes a somber, historical atmosphere with detailed clothing and expressive postures.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five figures clearly, with the central figure barefoot and holding a chain, and the varied expressions and postures of the group most visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backs of the figures, with visible bound hands and the layered arrangement of the group.
description_view_2: Back view showing the figures from behind, emphasizing the bound hands and the detailed texture of their clothing and hair.
description_view_3: Front-side view focusing on the leftmost female figure and the group’s arrangement, with facial features and clothing details visible from a diagonal perspective.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures in a somber, historical scene
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
